meaning: n.罢工,打击,殴打vt.打,撞击,冲击,罢工,打动,划燃,到达,侵袭vi.打,打击,罢工,抓,敲,搏动,打动,穿透
examples: A strike has shut the factory.
The workers balloted for a strike.
The lion crouched ready to strike.
The strike will now disrupt students as it coincides with GCSE and A-Level examinations.
Siegel added that the workers had no employment rights since they had taken unofficial strike action.
